sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n99571" key="sunau/geia" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">συναύγ-εια</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <abbr TEIform="abbr">=</abbr> foreg.; esp. <sense id="n99571.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">meeting of the rays of sight from the eye</tr_> (<etym lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="etym">ὄψις</etym>) <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">with the rays of light from the object seen</tr_>, ib.<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">4.13.11</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
